teaching.what: Co-Instructor, Physics-Informed Machine Learning, UC San Diego
teaching.detail: 5 lectures on foundation models, neural ODEs, neural operators, and PINNs; designed course homework on augmented neural ODEs, FNOs, and PINNs.
Numerical Analysis; Probability & Statistics; Intermediate Software Design.

reviewJournals: Automatica · IEEE Transactions on Automatic Control · Systems & Control Letters · Int'l Journal of Robust & Nonlinear Control · IEEE Control Systems Letters · IEEE Transactions on Control of Networked Systems.
